{{Template:Event Item}}

{{CargoRelic
|name=LavaLamp
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=2nd Anniversary Aug. 1 - Aug. 21 2025
|description=This is the LavaLamp, the Discord handle of one of our most active mods and beloved Travelers. One day, when the Snailverse needed him the most, he vanished…

According to Lilli, who proposed this Relic, LavaLamp was “one of my first friends when I started playing Snail game. Lava was an amazing club-mate, friend, and wiki-editor. They were always down to answer questions and were a huge help. 
—Winner of Relics of the Shellbound, 2025
|fame=58
|art=8
|fth=8
|civ=8
|tech=8
|ss1=Per 7 Sign-Ins, Snail HP +10 <br> Per 7 Sign-Ins, Snail ATK +1 <br> Per 7 Sign-Ins, Snail DEF +1 <br> Per 7 Sign-Ins, Snail RUSH +1 <br>Sign-Ins: 364/364
|ss2= Per 7 Sign-Ins, Snail HP +20 <br> Per 7 Sign-Ins, Snail ATK +2 <br> Per 7 Sign-Ins, Snail DEF +2 <br> Per 7 Sign-Ins, Snail RUSH +2 <br>Sign-Ins: 364/364
|ss3= Per 7 Sign-Ins, Snail HP +30 <br> Per 7 Sign-Ins, Snail ATK +3 <br> Per 7 Sign-Ins, Snail DEF +3 <br> Per 7 Sign-Ins, Snail RUSH +3 <br>Sign-Ins: 364/364
}}

[[Category:Sign-In Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
